hero.title: Private Luxury Traditional-Style Houses & Villas in Luxor
hero.subtitle1: Experience a unique stay in the heart of nature, surrounded by traditional life, beauty, history, and civilization in the magical city of Luxor.
hero.subtitle2: We offer a variety of luxury traditional-style homes and villas. Packages include private accommodation, visits, transfers, and tailored activities.

accommodations.title: Premium Accommodation Showcase
accommodations.desc: Immerse yourself in authentic luxury with architecture inspired by ancient Egyptian heritage and sand dunes.
accommodations.conciergeText: Please reach out directly to Alaa and our Satalana concierge team to check availability and tailor your private stay.

property-1.name: Traditional House
property-1.description: A natural landscape amidst mountains, nature, and Pharaonic temples.

tours.title: Tours & Curated Experiences
tours.desc: Discover the timeless secrets of Egypt's ancient heart with bespoke itineraries led by certified local Egyptologists.

additional.title: Additional Experiences
additional.desc: Step away from the ordinary and customize your journey with our additional, optional activities carefully crafted for authenticity.

horseCamel.title: Horse & Camel Riding
horseCamel.desc: Experience the landscapes of Luxor from a unique vantage point on traditional mounts.

bbq.title: Desert BBQ
bbq.desc: Enjoy a freshly prepared barbecue in the tranquility of the Egyptian desert.

camping.title: Desert Camping
camping.desc: Spend a night beneath the stars in an authentic desert camp setting.

day-1.title: Day 1: Karnak & West Bank Sunset
day-1.description: Explore Karnak Temple, Luxor Museum, Luxor Temple, and enjoy a West Bank sunset.

day-2.title: Day 2: Medinet Habu & Valley of the Queens
day-2.description: Visit Medinet Habu, Valley of the Queens, Temple of Seti, Deir el-Medina, and alabaster workshops.

day-3.title: Day 3: Valley of the Kings & Banana Island
day-3.description: Discover the Valley of the Kings, Hatshepsut, Colossi of Memnon, and a Nile trip to Banana Island.

day-4.title: Day 4: Hot-air Balloon & Felucca Sailing
day-4.description: Experience a hot-air balloon ride followed by a Felucca sailing trip and sunset.

day-5.title: Day 5: Arrival & Optional Activities
day-5.description: Optional activities upon arrival to customize your first day in Luxor.

details.carDriverDesc: Comfortable private transportation for up to 4 persons for the full day.
details.guideDesc: Optional add-on for expert insights and deep historical context.
details.bookTourDesc: To reserve this itinerary or customize it with optional activities, please contact our team directly. We are happy to design a schedule that perfectly matches your pace.

horse.title: Horse Riding
horse.desc: Experience the landscape of Luxor on authentic Arabian horses.

camel.title: Camel Riding
camel.desc: A traditional way to traverse the desert dunes and villages.

bbq.title: Desert BBQ
bbq.desc: A freshly prepared barbecue dinner in the quiet desert.

camping.title: Desert Camping
camping.desc: Spend the night under the stars in a traditional camp.

dahabiya.title: Dahabiya Nile Cruises
dahabiya.desc: Luxor to Aswan 4 nights sailing experience.

custom.title: Customized Experiences
custom.desc: Tailor-made activities based on your personal preferences.

dahabiya.title: Private Dahabiya Sailing Cruises
dahabiya.desc: Experience a private Dahabiya charter for 10-15 persons. Enjoy a one-night exclusive journey on the Nile for €3000, creating memories that last a lifetime.

details.desc1: Step aboard your private Dahabiya sailboat and experience the timeless magic of the River Nile. Tailored for groups of 10 to 15 guests, this full boat charter guarantees an intimate, exclusive atmosphere away from the crowded cruise ships.
details.desc2: Enjoy a one-night journey that immerses you in the peaceful rhythms of river life, passing lush riverbanks, ancient temples, and stunning Egyptian sunsets, all while being catered to by a dedicated crew.
details.secures: Secures the entire vessel for your private group for the one-night experience.
details.inquireDesc: Dahabiya sailing is highly requested and requires advanced booking. Please reach out to our concierge to verify dates and discuss your group's specific requirements.
details.title: Private Dahabiya Sailing

about.title: About Us & Satalana Travels
about.desc1: With 15 years of experience in the tourism industry, Alaa has dedicated his life to showcasing the true essence of Egypt. His deep-rooted passion for history and culture ensures that every guest experiences the magic of Luxor authentically.
about.desc2: The mission of Satalana Travels is to provide luxury accommodation, private tours, and personalized service, making sure that every journey is memorable, seamless, and uniquely yours.

why.accDesc: Stay in our meticulously designed traditional houses.
why.toursDesc: Explore with your own private car, driver, and optional guide.
why.cruiseDesc: Sail the Nile on traditional Dahabiyas.
why.localDesc: Engage in desert camping, BBQ, and camel rides.

contact.title: Contact Us Directly
contact.desc: Reach out directly to Alaa and the Satalana team to design your customized Luxor stay. We prefer personal communication to tailor your experience perfectly.

footer.desc: Providing luxury accommodation, private tours, and personalized service in the heart of Egypt.
